plant.description: Highly valued in Ayurveda for its cooling and blood-purifying properties.

method_1.method: Decoction of the whole dried plant.

medicinal_uses: The best herb for Pitta-dominant fevers and burning sensations.
Effectively treats skin diseases and excessive thirst.
Used as a mild laxative and liver tonic.

safety_profile.medical_supervision: Use under the guidance of a qualified Ayurvedic practitioner.

plant_profile.note: AI estimated profile based on known properties
